# OpenAgentGraph (OAG)

> OpenAgentGraph turns any codebase into a deterministic, agent-ready graph with paths, handoffs, benchmarks, and no provider key.

## What OAG is

- Deterministic codebase intelligence: file/symbol graph, communities, docs links, provenance, support tiers.
- Local-first static exports: `.oag/graph.json`, `.oag/graph.html`, `.oag/wiki/index.md`, `GRAPH_REPORT.md`.
- Agentic SDLC harness (1.7): readiness scorecard, context noise, verification map, bounded context packs.
- Agent context without source-body persistence or provider keys.

## What OAG is not

- Not a coding agent, hosted agent platform, or token compressor.
- Not a paid coordination tier. Base OAG does not require extra product folders or hosted services.

## 60-second npm path

```bash
npx @openagentgraph/cli@1.7.0 doctor --workspace .
npx @openagentgraph/cli@1.7.0 graph:export --workspace . --offline-only --redact-root
npx @openagentgraph/cli@1.7.0 graph:context --workspace . --goal "understand this repo" --include-verification --json
```

## Safe first commands

```bash
npm ci
npm run graph:export -- --workspace . --offline-only --redact-root
npm run graph:context -- --workspace . --goal "orient me" --include-verification --json
npm run graph:query -- --workspace . "how does auth work?"
npm run graph:check -- --workspace . --mode hard
```

If the npm CLI is installed, use `oag doctor --workspace .`, `oag graph:export --workspace . --offline-only --redact-root`, `oag dogfood --workspace .`, and `oag graph:context --workspace . --goal "orient me" --include-verification --json`.

## Read these files first

1. `GRAPH_REPORT.md` (generated per workspace; gitignored)
2. `llms.txt` (this file)
3. `LLMS.md` (agent workflow)
4. `docs/OAG-FOR-AGENTIC-SDLC.md` (agentic SDLC positioning)
5. `.oag/graph.json` and `.oag/wiki/index.md` after export

## Privacy and trust rules

- OAG never needs an AI provider key for scans, exports, graph navigation, or gates.
- Tool and CLI outputs do not include source file bodies.
- Do not commit generated `.oag/*` or `GRAPH_REPORT.md`.
- Support tiers are honest: T0 semantic, T1 structural, T2/T3 file-level — inspect source when tiers warn.
- Prefer static graph artifacts before broad repository scanning.

## Static artifacts

| Artifact | Use |
| --- | --- |
| `.oag/graph.json` | Machine-readable graph cache |
| `.oag/graph.html` | Human exploration |
| `.oag/wiki/index.md` | Compact wiki index |
| `GRAPH_REPORT.md` | Fast handoff orientation |

## CLI commands

| Command | When |
| --- | --- |
| `doctor` | Versions, workspace access, agentic readiness summary, next commands |
| `dogfood` | Full Base dogfood pass on an external workspace (no provider key) |
| `graph:export` | Create or refresh static artifacts |
| `graph:context` | Bounded agent context pack for a goal; add `--include-verification` for verify plan |
| `graph:query` | Neighborhood search; use `--mode code`, `--mode docs`, or `--mode balanced` |
| `graph:path` | Ranked route between two targets |
| `graph:explain` | Node/file neighborhood summary |
| `graph:check` | Hard/warn quality gates plus harness report and agentic scorecard (`--json`) |
| `graph:docs:check` | Broken link diagnostics; `--suggest` adds non-mutating repair proposals |
| `graph:learn` | Harness improvement proposals from workspace and/or agent logs (`--json`) |
| `graph:update` | Incremental `.oag/graph.json` refresh |
| `graph:retrieve` | Deeper lookup by `oag:*` retrieval id |
| `graph:scorecard` | Reproducible public benchmark proof; `--agentic-sdlc` for harness scorecard |

Published npm entry point: `oag <command>`. Repo scripts mirror the same backend CLIs.

## MCP tools

Run `npm run oag:mcp` for stdio MCP with: `oag_export`, `oag_query`, `oag_path`, `oag_explain`, `oag_check`, `oag_context`, `oag_retrieve`.

## Release proof

- Regenerate measured gates with `npm run verify:graph` and `npm run graph:scorecard`.
- See `docs/BENCHMARKS.md` for the full v1.7 public scorecard table.
- Performance and warm/cold numbers are benchmark-specific, not universal latency claims.

## Do not

- Read or copy from paid-tier or scratch export folders bundled outside Base OAG.
- Claim semantic support beyond what `graph:check` and fixtures prove.
- Auto-edit user-authored Markdown from `graph:docs:check --suggest` proposals.
- Auto-edit `AGENTS.md`, `README.md`, or `LLMS.md` from generated proposals.

## More docs

- `docs/OAG-FOR-AGENTIC-SDLC.md`
- `docs/AGENTIC-SDLC-HARNESS.md`
- `docs/AGENT-ACCESS-LAYER.md`
- `docs/MCP.md`
- `docs/GRAPH-CONTEXT.md`
- `docs/BENCHMARKS.md`
